summary: Built keyboard focus accessibility per design doc. Added :focus-visible styles for all interactive elements (nav buttons, game cards, form inputs) with accent color ring. Made game cards keyboard-navigable with tabindex=0, role=button, aria-label, and Enter/Space activation. Rebuilt frontend container, verified serving.
htmlChanged: game-card div: added tabindex=0, role=button, aria-label, onkeydown for Enter/Space
nextStep: Update styleguide with focus tokens. Look for next UX improvement opportunity.
